hero.headline:
The Recruiting Process
Just Got Simpler.
hero.subtext: Built by a real baseball dad for real baseball families. Take control of your recruiting journey today with the only AI powered app built to organize, match, and guide your entire recruiting process — on your terms.

steps.title: Build Your Profile
steps.description: Enter your stats, academics, position, and preferred regions. Takes less than 5 minutes.

steps.title: Build Your List
steps.description: Research programs, rate your top schools, track recruiting updates, and organize your recruiting journey in one place.

steps.title: Get AI Matches
steps.description: Our AI matches you with baseball programs that fit your preferences.

testimonial.quote: It was really hard to keep track of everything that was going on during my recruiting process. My parents and I couldn't keep up. I wanted one place where I could see and track everything. I wish my dad had made this for me before I committed!
testimonial.attribution: Jack M., Class of 2027 D1 Commit

pricing.title: Simple Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Start free for 5 days, then just $19.99 per year. Cancel anytime.
features: Track your recruiting journey in one place
Built by baseball parents who lived this process

whyWeBuiltThis.title: Why We Built This
paragraphs: We were baseball parents sitting at our kitchen table in Utah with a talented and stressed out kid, a phone full of texts, an inbox full of invites, and absolutely no system to manage any of it. We tried building a really complicated and cumbersome spreadsheet, but it wasn't enough. We had a recruit who was overwhelmed and a process that felt like it was controlling us instead of the other way around.
We looked for a tool that could help us organize programs, track interest levels, compare options, and make sense of it all. We couldn't find one. So we built it...for all of our sanity.
